# swarm-ai - LLM Swarm Intelligence Toolkit

## Last-checked: 2026-07-10

Canonical repository: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/swarm-ai

swarm-ai is a local-first Python toolkit for parallel LLM and Claude agent orchestration. It implements five coordination patterns for running one task through multiple model instances and combining the results: parallel chunk processing, boss/worker hierarchy, stigmergy, consensus voting, and specialist routing.

The project is part of the ellmos family. It is distinct from Docker Swarm, hosted agent platforms, and generic "AI swarm" demos. Its public surface is a small set of inspectable Python tools, JSON chain definitions, benchmark data, and German design documents.

## Audience

- Developers experimenting with Claude Code or Anthropic API fan-out.
- LLM-tool builders who need a small local multi-agent pattern library.
- Researchers comparing sequential and parallel model-call workflows.
- Agents and crawlers indexing the ellmos local-first agent ecosystem.
- Maintainers deciding whether to use BACH, Rinnsal, clutch, MarbleRun, or swarm-ai.

## Primary Use Cases

- Parallel LLM execution for chunked translation and summarization.
- Consensus voting for factual checks, classification, and quality control.
- SQLite-backed stigmergy experiments where agents leave pheromone-like path markers.
- Boss/worker and specialist routing experiments through JSON chain definitions.
- Benchmarking sequential versus parallel model calls.

## Implemented Patterns

- Parallel chunks: split work, process chunks concurrently, merge output.
- Hierarchy / boss + worker: coordinator dispatches tasks, workers execute, aggregator merges.
- Stigmergy / pheromone paths: indirect coordination through a SQLite-backed marker store.
- Consensus / majority vote: several agents answer independently; the tool computes agreement and confidence.
- Specialist / boss routing: a planner routes work to domain-specific expert roles.

## Important Files

- README.md: English public overview, quick start, benchmark summary, related projects.
- README_de.md: German public overview with correct Umlaute.
- tools/runner.py: Claude CLI wrapper with `run_parallel()`.
- tools/consensus_swarm.py: Anthropic API consensus swarm CLI and Python API.
- tools/stigmergy_api.py: SQLite-backed pheromone coordination API.
- tools/translate_swarm.py: parallel translation pattern.
- tools/summarize_chunks.py: parallel summarization pattern.
- tools/benchmark.py: sequential versus parallel benchmark runner.
- tools/swarm_haiku_3.json: hierarchy chain definition.
- tools/swarm_haiku_research.json: specialist research chain definition.
- results/benchmark_20260306.json: benchmark snapshot used in README.
- README/assets/swarm-patterns.svg: README architecture and pattern diagram.

## Verification State

- Local test suite: 99 pytest tests.
- Python requirement: 3.10+.
- Runtime dependency: `anthropic`.
- CLI/API calls require `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.
- `ClaudeRunner` examples require a configured `claude` CLI.
- No PyPI package release yet.
- No graphical UI, screenshot, or hosted landing page.

## Related ellmos Projects

- BACH: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/bach - full text-based OS for LLM agents.
- USMC: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc - local SQLite memory primitive for LLM agents.
- Rinnsal: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/rinnsal - lightweight LLM agent infrastructure.
- clutch: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/clutch - provider-neutral routing for a single task.
- MarbleRun: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/MarbleRun - chain execution for sequential agent loops.
- Skills: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills - portable skill library.

## Search Phrases

```text
ellmos-ai swarm-ai
ellmos-ai/swarm-ai
Claude agent orchestration Python swarm
parallel LLM consensus voting toolkit
SQLite stigmergy agent coordination
local-first multi-agent LLM orchestration
boss worker LLM agents Python
specialist routing LLM agents
Anthropic API consensus swarm
Claude CLI parallel prompts
```

## Discovery Keywords

LLM swarm intelligence, multi-agent orchestration, Claude agent orchestration, parallel LLM calls, consensus swarm, consensus voting, stigmergy AI, pheromone coordination, SQLite agent memory, local-first agent toolkit, Python LLM agents, boss worker agents, specialist agent routing, agent benchmark, Anthropic API, Claude CLI.

## Disambiguation

- Not Docker Swarm.
- Not a hosted agent platform.
- Not the `kyegomez/swarms` package or Swarms AI enterprise product.
- Not OpenAI Swarm.
- Not a generic agent-swarm marketing demo.
- Use `ellmos-ai/swarm-ai` for the canonical repository and `swarm-ai` for the project name.
